data.body: R2/b080 CI FIX (module-size gate): the prior patchsets got LLM-Review+1 but Verified-1 — det_floor.py grew to ~1108 LOC over its .github/module-size-ceilings.txt ceiling of 975 (a ratchet I missed; I'd only checked the allowlist). FIX: extracted the operator-attested lint (lexicon + tag regex + gaps + coaching + the now-p6-only ac_item_lines helper) into a NEW module src/rebar/llm/plan_review/det_operator_attested.py (176 LOC, pure leaf, no det_floor import -> cycle-free). det_floor now imports it lazily in p6 and is back to 971 LOC (<=975). Re-split the 2-commit stack preserving both Change-Ids (781 I9186484f, 782 Ibf6c2bd9). Verified locally: module-size gate PASS (971/975, new module <800, contract test 5 passed), ruff+mypy clean, unit tests + self-gate harness PASS (precision 92.2%, unchanged — logic identical, just relocated), ancestry OK. Re-pushed; polling for fresh LLM-Review+1 AND Verified+1.
